author: @frogmouth2
text:
There are 2 things I’d change for breath or the wild 2.

Those are post game. I know zelda games usually end when you defeat the big bad (usually Ganon) and the game brings you to right before the fight or last time you saved. Breath of the wild doesn’t follow any real unlocking order or structure so I feel it makes more sense. It doesn’t even have to be actual new content past beating the game, just continuation.

And sped up or even removed staggering time. There were several times where how long it takes link to get up went from annoying to hazardous. It was especially annoying with guardians.
